# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that creates releases and publishes packages. On version tags, build the application, create a GitHub release, and publish to npm/PyPI. Make the release process fully automated so developers can just push tags to trigger releases.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Release and Publish

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*' # Triggers on tags like v1.0.0, v1.0.0-beta.1

jobs:
  build-and-create-github-release:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: write # Needed to create GitHub Releases

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20' # Specify your desired Node.js version

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build project
        run: npm run build # Replace with your project's build command

      - name: Get tag version
        id: get_version
        run: echo "VERSION=${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT # Extracts '1.0.0' from 'v1.0.0'

      - name: Create GitHub Release
        id: create_release
        uses: actions/create-release@v1
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }} # This token is provided by GitHub Actions
        with:
          tag_name: ${{ github.ref }}
          release_name: Release ${{ steps.get_version.outputs.VERSION }}
          body: |
            ## Release ${{ steps.get_version.outputs.VERSION }}

            🚀 This release includes:
            - Updated features
            - Bug fixes
            - Performance improvements
            
            Check the [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md) for more details.
          draft: false
          prerelease: ${{ contains(steps.get_version.outputs.VERSION, '-') }} # True if tag contains hyphen (e.g., v1.0.0-beta.1)

  publish-to-npm:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build-and-create-github-release] # Ensures this job only runs after the GitHub Release is created successfully

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org' # Configure for npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build project (re-run for publishing context)
        run: npm run build # Ensure build artifacts are present for npm publish

      - name: Get tag version
        id: get_version
        run: echo "VERSION=${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Publish to npm
        env:
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }} # Your npm token (must be configured in GitHub Secrets)
        run: |
          if [[ "${{ contains(steps.get_version.outputs.VERSION, '-') }}" == "true" ]]; then
            npm publish --tag next # For prereleases, publish with 'next' tag
          else
            npm publish
          fi
